text:
There lived a boy named Alex. Every evening he’d gaze at the stars through his bedroom window, dreaming about places he’d explore. After passing his exams, he wanted nothing more than to spend his summers exploring the galaxy.

One day, while reading an old science fiction book about expeditions to exoplanets, Alex realized he couldn’t live anywhere other than on Mars. He planned his journey. He learned Russian, visited NASA’s libraries, and saved every space novel he could find.

Summer finally arrived. Alex packed his gear, including a dog named Luna—a rescue turned pet star. Before setting off, he donated generously to Mars exploration funds.

His adventure began on Earth, visiting sights like Machu Picchu. There he felt connected to the rich history and wonder of Earth. But longing for his trip pushed him to visit Moscow's stars.

After months adventuring, Alex made the trip to Mars. Landing at Gale Crater, he climbed Mount Erebus. He discovered a beautiful blue river
